title: Incident Event
description: Schema for recording an incident event for DORA MTTR and CFR calculation

id.description: Unique incident identifier (PagerDuty ID or similar)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when incident was created/detected

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when incident was resolved. Null if still open.

severity.description: Incident severity. P1=critical, P2=major, P3=minor, P4=low

caused_by_deployment.description: Whether this incident was caused by a deployment (used for CFR calculation)
